calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Brian Haavisto, Esq. for Petitioner: Patricia Abrams, present as guardian ad litem with Bridget Briggs, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's fees: $15,400.17
Balance of the settlement procees shall be disbursed in accordance with the terms and provisions of the settlement terms set forth in the periodic payment agreement dated 5-19-04.
Pacific Life and Annuity Services, Inc. will make guaranteed periodic monetary payments of $8,030.00 semi-annually for four years commencing on 7-15-2012 and ending on 01-15-2016.
Order signed in court.
